CREATE TABLE blobs (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, data BLOB);
SELECT octet_length(data) FROM blobs WHERE id = 1;
SELECT octet_length(data) FROM blobs WHERE id = 2;
SELECT octet_length(data) FROM blobs WHERE id = 3;
SELECT octet_length(data) FROM blobs WHERE id = 4;
SELECT id, octet_length(data) FROM blobs ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, octet_length(data) AS length FROM blobs WHERE length > 0;
CREATE TABLE other_blobs (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, data BLOB);
CREATE VIEW combined_lengths AS SELECT b.id, octet_length(b.data) AS blob_length, ob.id AS other_id, octet_length(ob.data) AS other_blob_length FROM blobs b JOIN other_blobs ob ON b.id = ob.id;
SELECT b.id, octet_length(b.data) FROM blobs b WHERE octet_length(b.data) > (SELECT AVG(octet_length(data)) FROM other_blobs);
SELECT id, octet_length(data) AS length FROM blobs WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM other_blobs);
SELECT b.id as blob_id, OB.id as other_blob_id, octet_length(b.data) + octet_length(OB.data) as total_length FROM blobs b JOIN other_blobs OB ON b.id = OB.id;
